slide1.title: Grow together with <highlight>your community.</highlight>
slide1.message: dnocs is a platform designed to facilitate seamless resource sharing within your community; enabling collaboration, connection, and efficient use of shared assets.

slide2.title: Focus on <highlight>your business.</highlight>
slide2.message: Let dnocs's automated system assist your operations so you can focus on your business. Issues like security, scalability, reliability, and observability are handled automatically by the system.

dashboard.headerDesc: View your deployed applications and registered servers here.
dashboard.headerFootnote: You can use your own resources or a public resource to create application. Visit our YouTube channel for a tutorial.

database.headerDesc: View your deployed databases and its users here.
database.headerFootnote: You can use your own resources or a public resource to create database. Visit our YouTube channel for a tutorial.

applications.headerFootnote: You can use your own resources or a public resource to create application. Visit our YouTube channel for a tutorial.

emptyState.title: No applications found.
emptyState.message: Why not add new one to get started?

loadBalancers.title: Load Balancers
loadBalancers.emptyMessage: No load balancers linked to this application.

githubBanner.title: Some information might be missing
githubBanner.subtitle: You'll need to log in to your GitHub account to see them.

artifactsHistory.title: Artifacts History
artifactsHistory.subtitle: Recent artifacts and rollback options
artifactsHistory.unsupportedMessage: Artifacts are not supported for this app.
artifactsHistory.distributedStorageWarning: This application does not use distributed storage for build artifacts. Builds and deployments are executed individually on each machine where the application is running.

usageStats.title: Usage Stats
usageStats.unavailablePlaceholder: Corresponding usage stats are unavailable for this application.

serviceActions.unavailablePlaceholder: Corresponding service is unavailable for this application.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.deleteThisAppDescription: Permanently remove this application and all its data. This action cannot be undone.

applicationsCreate.headerDesc: Deploy a new web application to your server in just a few steps.

sectionSelectSource.title: Select Source
sectionSelectSource.desc: You'll need to provide your application source through GitHub or create a new one based on our bundles.

sectionGithubRepo.title: Select GitHub Repository
sectionGithubRepo.desc: Pick one of your github repository to be initiated as your application source.

sectionAppDetails.title: Application Details
sectionAppDetails.desc: Let's define what your app name will be and how it can be accessed.
sectionAppDetails.inputProgLangVersionPlaceholder: Enter your application programming language version

sectionSelectServer.title: Select Server
sectionSelectServer.desc: You'll need to select a server the app will be hosted in.

sectionDeploySummary.title: Deployment Summary
sectionDeploySummary.desc: Make sure everything is in order before deploying.

servers.headerFootnote: Supported operating systems: Ubuntu 22.04, 22.10, 24.04; Debian 11, 12. Visit our YouTube channel for a tutorial.

emptyState.title: No servers found.

emptyState.title: You haven't installed any modules yet.
emptyState.subtitle: Our modules discovery has tons of modules you can add for your server.

runningServices.headerDesc: See all running services for this server.

sshKeys.headerDesc: Manage your SSH keys to securely access virtual machines without entering a password each time.

deleteDialog.title: Delete SSH Key
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}" ({id})?

detail.name: Name
detail.privateKeyWarning: Keep this key secret. Never share your private key with anyone. Anyone with access to this key can log in to your servers.
detail.deleteThisKeyDescription: Once deleted, this key cannot be recovered. Any server configured to use it will require a new key.

deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

emptyState.title: No SSH keys added yet
emptyState.message: Add an SSH key to securely access your virtual machines without entering a password each time.

notFound.description: The page you are looking for is unavailable or may have been moved. Check the URL again or go back to the previous page.

immediatelyCommitOnSave.message: Note: Clicking Save will immediately process changes without confirmation.

fieldLbKind.hintL7: L7 allocation enables HTTP/HTTPS protocol inspection and URI-based path routing.
fieldLbKind.hintL4: L4 allocation enables TCP/UDP port-based forwarding without protocol inspection.

migrateOwnership.title: Migrate Ownership
migrateOwnership.summaryMessage: Permissions will be transferred to the new owner immediately. This action will revoke existing management access for the current owner.
